name: Kualoa Ranch
tagline: Jurassic Valley ATV tours, horseback rides, and ziplines on a working cattle ranch — where they filmed Jurassic Park.
hours: Daily 7:30am–5:30pm; tours run on set schedules — book online in advance
bestTime: Morning tours have better light for Kualoa Valley photos and cooler temps
kamaaina: Kamaaina rates available with valid Hawaii ID — significant discount on tour packages
talkStory: Different activities for different ages: the Jurassic Valley bus tour is good for all ages including toddlers. Horseback riding starts at age 10, ATV at age 16 (or ride as passenger). The Secret Island beach is great for younger keiki — calm water and kayaks included. Book the combo packages for best value. Bring sunscreen and closed-toe shoes for most activities.
